title: Consensus Round 1 seat response
description: One seat's blinded opening statement: its stance, position, arguments, risks, recommended direction, confidence, and questions for the council. No peer outputs are visible in Round 1.

stance.description: The stance overlay this seat argued from (e.g. devils_advocate, balanced_synthesis).

position_summary.description: The seat's position in a few sentences, self-contained.

key_arguments.description: The main arguments supporting the position, each a concise standalone statement.

risks_or_limits.description: Risks, limits, or failure modes the seat sees in its own position or the question.

recommended_direction.description: The single direction the seat recommends the council take.

confidence.description: The seat's confidence (0-100) in its recommended direction.

questions_for_the_council.description: Open questions this seat wants other seats or the user to answer.
